task_objective: Add instance-level environment overrides for Ludusavi discovery and subprocess execution
design_decisions: Exposed custom environment configuration only at instance construction via Ludusavi(env=...).
Merged supplied overrides over a copy of os.environ before subprocess use.
Forwarded the resolved environment through discovery verification, PATH lookup, and executor subprocess calls.
Kept default discovery subprocess calls compatible by omitting env when no custom environment is supplied.
results: Focused red-green tests passed for core, discovery, and Ludusavi constructor behavior.
